extortion.description: With a senior team and over 130 clients, Danthi Comunicacao Integrada believes in building close, long-term, and trust-based relationships with all its partners. With extensive experience in positive exposure, brand reputation building, and image and reputation crisis management, Danthi works in an integrated and strategic manner with traditional press relations and digital communications. A company's image is directly linked to how it communicates with the public. In a 24/7 connected world, this premise requires strategy and a communications team that knows how to plan, identify key messages, and convey them assertively across multiple platforms.
